item.title: The people of Oakland County MI want Flock and the civil servant who serve these big corporations instead of the people, out!
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/debateherofficial !!!Congress shall make no law respecting!!! an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof; or abridging the freedom of speech, or of the press; or the right of the people peaceably to assemble, !!!!!!and to petition the Government for a redress of grievances.!!!!! So how come the police are always harassing people at these events? "This is a public forum" we can't have to people speaking up, this forum is just for the politicians to lie to you, not for you to speak to them. If she's exciting the people it's in agreement not in conflict.

item.title: In the midst of everything else that's happening, the IDF just shot a nine year old girl in the back of the head in front of a dozen other children for absolutely no reason, because of course they did.
item.description: She was in an improvised classroom in a tent, having a math lesson: https://www.democracynow.org/2026/4/10/headlines/9_year_old_palestinian_girl_shot_dead_in_front_of_classmates_in_gazas_beit_lahia

25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @tfoust10 did this wonderful one-line drawing a few years ago. I love these. Check out their posts for more.
27 Man Tax: John Krasinski
“Nature does nothing without purpose or uselessly.” - Joseph Addison So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.description: Quote was from the 1980s Canadian sketch show "SCTV" – Big Jim McBain played by Joe Flaherty and Billy Shakes played by John Candy.

item.title: Sometimes they can surprise you
item.description: Thanks to following @Shenaniganz80 and @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow posts worked up enough to tell at least mom, who was super supportive and put a lot of anxiety to rest. At some point I'll post something other than this stuff, but for now still lurking and just wanted to say thanks to a really positive community here, even with the site slowly losing what made it great in the first place.

item.dc:creator: jarable

item.title: Why
item.description: For the last six years I was working for one of the biggest tech companies out there and earning a six figure salary. I was unexpectedly laid off and feel like my whole world is collapsing. I'm single and paying off a large mortgage while leaving in one of the most expensive European capitals. I have enough saved to pay my mortgage for the next 12 months and welfare should take care of my day to day expenses, but at 51 I'm terrified of not being able to find a job quickly enough. Just a reminder that your company doesn't give a shit about you and won't hesitate to turn your world upside down for no good reason.
item.dc:creator: WholesomeAsFuck

item.title: Genuine story reveled behind the massive repost of bullshit like "racist man wants blacks to leave neighborhood"
item.description:
Saw this making its rounds here with some real loser titles and misinformation. Thought I'd post what I had and clear it up. Man had nothing to do with the home owners and (obviously) was suffering severe mental issues. He said he could hear people inside the house screaming so he approached. He even made his way into the house
The owner of the home was communicating through ring and was already racing home. He popped the intruder in the head with a shovel and de escalated the situation until police arrived and took the invader away
item.dc:creator: CriminallyMysophobic

item.title: GovBrief Today #435
item.description: The permanent record your teacher threatened you with is real now, and the federal government is the one building it. A grand jury in Washington has subpoenaed Reddit to unmask a user whose offense was criticizing ICE and posting "TSA sucks." The Justice Department went back to court Thursday and demanded the right to search a Washington Post reporter's phone and laptops, and the 1,200 sources stored on them, three months after the FBI raided her home at dawn. And an appeals court just restored DOGE's access to the Social Security records of 300 million Americans, even after the government admitted its own people shared that data with a political group trying to overturn election results. None of this requires a wiretap or a warrant or any particular respect for the Constitution. It requires an administration that treats your data the way it treats everything else: as something it's entitled to, and you're not entitled to question. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand congressional hearings on federal data collection, because the file they're building on you grows every night they go unchecked. We've emailed 6,900+ stories over 435 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website (embedded links, data, image): https://go.govbrief.today/260410-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr10 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/medicaid-error [3] https://go.govbrief.today/artemis2-splashdown [4] https://go.govbrief.today/alaska-ranked-choice [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-reddit [6] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-reporter-data [7] https://go.govbrief.today/ssa-doge-access [8] https://go.govbrief.today/arch-renders [9] https://go.govbrief.today/blanket-pardons [10] https://go.govbrief.today/swalwell-accusations [11] https://go.govbrief.today/dems-trump-cognition [12] https://go.govbrief.today/faa-stock-sale [13] https://go.govbrief.today/mesa-holding Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
